title: Assistant Store Manager - Taj Hotels Retail - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Taj Hotels Retail - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!
